venturesHero.title: Ventures
venturesHero.intro: Afari Trails Ventures is committed to sustainable development across hospitality, conservation, and community — creating long-term value for the land, its people, and those who journey through it.

venturesMission.label: Our Mission
venturesMission.heading: Developing Africa's potential with purpose.
venturesMission.body: We partner on ventures that honor wilderness, empower communities, and build hospitality rooted in authenticity — bridging tourism, conservation, and local development for generations to come.

focusAreas.title: Eco-Lodges
focusAreas.description: Boutique safari camps and wilderness stays immersed in the landscape.

focusAreas.title: Conservation
focusAreas.description: Wildlife preservation and eco-conscious operations across wild places.

focusAreas.title: Community Empowerment
focusAreas.description: Local employment, education, and artisan collaborations that endure.

focusAreas.title: Sustainable Agriculture
focusAreas.description: Regenerative land stewardship and agricultural partnerships.

focusAreas.title: Hospitality Development
focusAreas.description: Safari retreats, wellness camps, and boutique properties.

featuredProject.label: Featured Project
featuredProject.title: Zambezi Lodge Development
featuredProject.description: An eco-lodge vision along the Zambezi corridor — low-impact hospitality designed for stillness, river views, and deep connection to the valley.

venturesCta.quote: When we invest in Africa, we invest in a future worth leaving behind.
venturesCta.heading: Let's Build Together
venturesCta.body: We welcome conversations with landowners, hospitality partners, conservation groups, and aligned investors.

featuredProjects.title: Zambezi Lodge Development
featuredProjects.description: An eco-lodge vision along the Zambezi corridor — low-impact hospitality designed for stillness, river views, and deep connection to the valley.
featuredProjects.story: Along the Zambezi corridor, Afari Trails is developing a low-impact eco-lodge vision — architecture that defers to the river, the forest, and the rhythm of the valley.
featuredProjects.vision: To create a hospitality destination that protects wild corridors, employs local communities, and offers guests a deeply grounded sense of place.
featuredProjects.locationBody: A riverside site selected for minimal ecological disturbance, access to conservation partnerships, and long-term community benefit.
featuredProjects.communityImpact: Local employment in construction and operations, artisan partnerships, and training programs tied to hospitality and conservation skills.
featuredProjects.conservation: Low-density design, renewable energy targets, waste reduction systems, and collaboration with regional wildlife initiatives.

timeline.title: Site selection & partnerships
timeline.body: Land assessment and alignment with conservation stakeholders.

timeline.title: Concept & design development
timeline.body: Architecture, guest experience planning, and impact framework.

timeline.title: In development
timeline.body: Advancing permits, partnerships, and phased build planning.

featuredProjects.title: Conservation Field Program
featuredProjects.description: A long-horizon conservation initiative supporting wildlife monitoring, habitat restoration, and community-led stewardship.
featuredProjects.story: This program connects field research, local guardianship, and tourism revenue to protect landscapes Afari Trails explores.
featuredProjects.vision: Build durable conservation capacity through partnerships, training, and measurable ecological outcomes.
featuredProjects.locationBody: Pilot landscapes selected with community consent and existing conservation networks.
featuredProjects.communityImpact: Ranger training, local employment, and revenue-sharing models tied to conservation outcomes.
featuredProjects.conservation: Habitat monitoring, anti-poaching collaboration, and regenerative land practices.

timeline.title: Program design
timeline.body: Partner mapping and pilot site evaluation.

venturesPartnersCollaborations.heading: Partners & Collaborations
venturesPartnersCollaborations.description: We collaborate with organizations, communities, and industry leaders who share our vision for sustainable tourism, conservation, and responsible development.
